A

add(I) - Method in interface structs.list.List
the add(I toAdd) method adds the given element to the end of the list

the add(I toAdd, int index) method adds the given element at the given index

LinkedList<T> - Class in structs.list
A Singly Linked List with a dummy head node and a tail pointer
LinkedList() - Constructor for class structs.list.LinkedList
initializes the linked list with a dummy head node, a tail pointing to said head node, and a size of 0

T

test(boolean, String) - Static method in class testUtils.Results
this method returns Strings that show the result of a boolean test in the form
"-- (name) - (PASSED/FAILED) - [(check/x)]" - with check being replaced with the unicode checkmark, and with the slashes being (if value true)/(if value false)
testUtils - package testUtils
